nasb.text: The cities shall be theirs to live in; and their pasture lands shall be for their cattle and for their herds and for all their beasts.

esv.text: The cities shall be theirs to dwell in, and their pasturelands shall be for their cattle and for their livestock and for all their beasts.

cnv.text: 這些城要歸他們居住，城的郊區可以牧放他們的牛羊和一切牲畜，也可以存放他們的財物。

ccb.text: 城邑供他们居住，草场供他们牧放牛羊等牲畜。
